parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1: Could I ask you exactly where the yoga studio is? I've never been there before.

Speaker 2: Yes, of course. The studio is on the same street as the rest of the gym, just next to the fitness centre.

Speaker 1: Ah, I see. That shouldn't be too difficult to find.

Speaker 2: No, none of our customers have got lost so far.

Speaker 1: And is there anything special I need to bring for the class?

Speaker 2: You don't need any special equipment, but you should come wearing some comfortable clothes. Also, most of the class members choose not to wear any shoes of any kind.

Speaker 1: Yes, I thought as much. OK, I'll remember to pack a change of clothes in my bag then. Um, I'm probably going to want to have a wash after the class. Are there showers nearby?

Speaker 2: Yes, we have showers in all of the changing rooms and we provide a towel for our customers at no extra cost. There's also a vending machine where you can buy soap and shampoo.

Speaker 1: That's good to know. Thank you for all the information.

Speaker 2: Before you go, could I interest you in another class that we are offering?

Speaker 1: Maybe. What's the class?

Speaker 2: We have an instructor from China who has come to our gym to teach a self-defence class. The class this Saturday is a trial for new customers.

Speaker 1: I suppose it might be useful to learn how to defend myself, but unfortunately, I think I'm busy on Saturday.

Speaker 2: All right, never mind. I've got you down for the yoga classes in the evening and we'll see you when you come in on Wednesday.

Speaker 1: Great. Thank you for your help.

Speaker 2: No problem. Goodbye.

Speaker 1: Bye.
